zh.of Clayton, Lancashire, England: 英國英格蘭藍卡爾克雷頓 勒 伍茲
zh.lifeSummary: 當Sir Richard Byron於1404年出生在英國藍卡爾克雷頓時，他的父親John de Byron III33歲，母親Margery Booth18歲。他於1425年與Lucy de Ashton在英國藍卡爾克雷頓結婚。他們至少是1個兒子和2個女兒的父母。他去世於1449年在他的家鄉享年45歲，埋葬在英國英格蘭藍卡爾曼徹斯特。

nameMeanings.name: Byron
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: habitational name from Byram (Yorkshire), named with Old English bȳrum ‘at the cattle sheds’, dative plural of bȳre ‘byre’. This name has occasionally been adopted as a Jewish surname, presumably as an Americanized form of some similar (like-sounding) Jewish name.

nameMeanings.name: Richard
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: One of the most enduringly successful of the Old French personal names introduced into Britain by the Normans. It is of Germanic (Frankish) origin, derived from rīc ‘power’ + hard ‘strong, hardy’. It has enjoyed continuous popularity in England from the Conquest to the present day, influenced by the fact that it was borne by three kings of England, in particular Richard I ( 1157–99 ). He was king for only ten years ( 1189–99 ), most of which he spent in warfare abroad, taking part in the Third Crusade and costing the people of England considerable sums in taxes. Nevertheless, he achieved the status of a folk hero, and was never in England long enough to disappoint popular faith in his goodness and justice. He was also Duke of Aquitaine and Normandy and Count of Anjou, fiefs which he held at a time of maximum English expansion in France. His exploits as a leader of the Third Crusade earned him the nickname ‘Coeur de Lion’ or ‘Lionheart’ and a permanent place in popular imagination, in which he was even more firmly enshrined by Sir Walter Scott's novel Ivanhoe ( 1820 ).

en.lifeSummary: When Sir Richard Byron was born in 1404, in Clayton, Lancashire, England, his father, John de Byron III, was 33 and his mother, Margery Booth, was 18. He married Lucy de Ashton in 1425, in Clayton, Lancashire, England. They were the parents of at least 1 son and 2 daughters. He died in 1449, in his hometown, at the age of 45, and was buried in Manchester, Lancashire, England, United Kingdom.

Il a épousé Lucy de Ashton en 1425, à Clayton, Lancashire, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils et 2 filles. Il est décédé en 1449, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 45 ans, et a été enterré à Manchester, Lancashire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

ko.of Clayton, Lancashire, England: 영국 잉글랜드 랭카실르 클레이턴 일 우드즈
ko.lifeSummary: Sir Richard Byron(이)가 1404년 영국 랭카실르 클레이턴에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 John de Byron III(은)는 33세였고, 그의 어머니 Margery Booth(은)는 18세였다. 그는 1425년 영국 랭카실르 클레이턴에서 Lucy de Ashton(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1449년 그의 고향에서 45세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 랭카실르 먼체스터에 묻혔다.

Он женился на женщине по имени Lucy de Ashton в 1425 г. в местности клеитон, ланкашир, Англия. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын и 2 дочери. Он умер в 1449 г. в его родном городе в возрасте 45 лет и был похоронен в местности манчестир, ланкашир, Англия, Великобритания.
